title: hieracium murorum subsp. leptotes
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. leptotes is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly known as wall hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. leptotes include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
